summary: Completed backend testing for Iteration 24 - Currency Conversion Service & Server Refactoring. All 32 tests passed (100%). Currency conversion service working with live exchange rates. Marketing stats datetime fix verified. All refactored endpoints working via dedicated routers.
critical_code_review_comments: CurrencyService class properly implements exchange rate fetching with 6-hour cache
Currency detection from URL domains works correctly (amazon.com -> USD, amazon.in -> INR, etc.)
Fallback rates provided for when live API is unavailable
Marketing stats datetime fix properly handles timezone-aware comparisons using parse_date helper
Settings router properly exposes auto-sync, notifications, general, and shipping endpoints
Marketing router properly exposes stats, campaigns, analytics, and segments endpoints
Competitor analysis router includes currency-rates endpoint for price conversion display
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 tested currency conversion and server refactoring. Key endpoints verified: GET /api/competitor/currency-rates (returns live exchange rates to INR), GET /api/marketing/stats (datetime fix working), GET /api/settings/auto-sync, GET /api/settings/notifications, GET /api/settings/general, GET /api/whatsapp/conversations (returns 'count' not 'total'), GET /api/shopify/sync-status/{job_id} (returns 404 for non-existent jobs). Currency rates: USD=90.21, EUR=105.48, GBP=121.74, CNY=12.91, AED=24.56 to INR.

currency_conversion_service.supported_currencies: PASS - USD, EUR, GBP, CNY, AED all present
currency_conversion_service.rate_values: PASS - All rates within reasonable ranges

marketing_router.GET /api/marketing/stats: PASS - Returns revenue and order stats

whatsapp_router.GET /api/whatsapp/conversations: PASS - Returns conversation list with count
